chk_server_probe_observations_players.name: chk_server_probe_observations_players
chk_server_probe_observations_players.value: ("server_probe_observations"."outcome" = 'online' and ("server_probe_observations"."online_players" is null or "server_probe_observations"."online_players" >= 0)) or ("server_probe_observations"."outcome" <> 'online' and "server_probe_observations"."online_players" is null)
